title: SortME
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf54179a03c9ac515ccf2e79613ec825254a8278.png)
1.0


---

![f](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftr7zw.github.io%2Fuikit%2Fheadlines%2Flarge%2FAbout.png)


This simple mod allows you to **sort your inventory with click of a button.** The mod is lightweight and should run fine on any sort of computer or console like steam deck. One click sorts items and merges identical stacks. It does not override vanilla behavior. **Compatibility with other inventory mods is not guaranteed.** This mod works on client just fine, tho you have to have **Fabric api** installed.

---


![f](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftr7zw.github.io%2Fuikit%2Fheadlines%2Flarge%2FFeatures.png)

> The mod has a bunch of features but the main one as you may know sorts your inventory. The mod is early devolopment and has a lot of feautures planned to the future.

### Current feautures:

- Inventory button for sorting
- Some basic mod support
- Dev command

### Planned feautures:

- Advanced sorting 
- Basic config menu
- Sort chests, barrels etc.
- More support for other mods
